pain_points.signal: Experiencing persistent and disruptive app bugs on mobile (freezing, syncing errors, display issues, crashes).
Feeling forced or pressured to upgrade despite not reaching plan limits.
Mobile app is severely feature-limited compared to the desktop/web version, forcing reliance on a computer for core tasks.
Encountering critical account access issues (login failures, 2FA problems, sign-up errors).
Perceiving pricing/cost models as unfair or a 'money grab'.
Finding basic features for organization and management (contact import, task dependency, list cleanup) to be broken or needlessly manual.
Getting unhelpful or slow customer support, especially for critical access issues.

desired_outcomes.outcome: A stable, reliable, and bug-free mobile app that works as expected.
A mobile app with core feature parity with the desktop/web version.
Transparent and fair pricing without aggressive upgrade pressure.
Simplified account security/login that works globally and doesn't block access.
Automation and intelligence that reduces manual work (e.g., auto-adjusting dependent tasks, easier list cleanup).
Better and more accessible customer support for troubleshooting.
Efficient organization and management tools on mobile (sorting contacts, editing on the go).

purchase_triggers.trigger: Recognition of key features (e.g., integrations, link checking, templates) that directly enable a business workflow.
purchase_triggers.context: When starting or resuming a business and seeking a reliable, integrated system.

purchase_triggers.trigger: Positive, 'life-changing' impact on personal and professional organization.
purchase_triggers.context: After experiencing a significant improvement in productivity and organization.

purchase_triggers.trigger: Loyalty earned through effective free plan usage that demonstrably brings in revenue.
purchase_triggers.context: Business growth reaches a point where the perceived value justifies paying.

purchase_triggers.trigger: App improvements that dramatically enhance user experience and UI.
purchase_triggers.context: After a major update successfully fixes previous pain points and improves usability.

objections.objection: The mobile app is too buggy and unreliable for daily/professional use.
The pricing model feels like a 'money grab' and is not appropriate for the value.
The mobile app is missing critical features, making it useless for core tasks.
Account access and security processes are overly complicated and broken.
The product is not stable or trustworthy enough for a paid subscription.

switching_triggers.reason: Persistent, unresolved bugs that make the app unusable for daily tasks.

switching_triggers.reason: Aggressive and unfair pressure to upgrade the paid plan.

switching_triggers.reason: Mobile app is too limited and forces users back to the desktop for real work.

deal_breakers: Unresolved critical bugs that block core functionality (login, syncing, editing).

Completely broken account access/security with no support resolution.

Access to key features (like rules) on mobile

signal.description: A specific behavioral pattern or need, stated as a signal.

evidence.description: Exact quotes from reviews that demonstrate this signal.

review_ratings.description: The ratings of the reviews that provided the evidence.
